title.en: These elders each held a Heavenly Order, and Ye...

content.en:
These elders each held a Heavenly Order, and Ye Tian and they were also ready.

The First Patriarch personally escorted him over, and let these Patriarchs, as well as Ye Tian and the dozen or so Legends of them, go to the Dao Realm to the Ancient Abyss Realm.

And the Ancient Abyss Realm was very far away from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and even the First Elder would have to spend a lot of time before he could send them over.

......

Mogu is in the line.

On a majestic throne, a Void Demon with a body as black as ink, with a large number of black scales and six black horns on his head, sat on it.

He is the number one demon venerable of the Demon Gu lineage - the Demon Gu!

The Void Demon Ancient Vein of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Ancient was almost created by him according to his own blood, and gradually developed and grew into the current Demon Ancient Vein.

At this time.

Many Demon Venerables and Top Demon Lords of the Demon Ancient First Vein and other veins gathered here.

"The Gu Yuan Realm has appeared, and this Demon Venerable is bound to obtain the Gu Yuan Fruit, if you get the Gu Yuan Fruit, this Demon Venerable can continue to take this step. This is the thirty-two Demon Ancient Orders refined by this Demon Venerable, which can allow thirty junior Mythic-level Demon Venerables to enter. "

"Just you thirty-two Demon Venerables, let's go in this time!"

Demon Gu's order, the thirty-two Demon Venerables did not dare to refute at all, and responded one after another: "Yes, First Demon Venerable!"

"Top Demon Lord, let me go in all of them too!"

Mogu commanded.

Those dozens of demon lords didn't dare to resist, even if they knew that they would die easily if they entered, they had to go in.

If they didn't go in, Mogu would kill them on the spot.

The Void Demon Side of the Supreme Dao was not as merciful as the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and they could kill whoever they wanted.

"I must be given to obtain the Gu Yuan Fruit at all costs, if it is said that the Supreme Dao Void Demon obtains the Gu Yuan Fruit, I guarantee that he will become a Demon Venerable, and he is also a top Demon Venerable. If the Demon Venerable obtains the Gu Yuan Fruit, I guarantee that he will become a top ten Demon Venerable!"

Mogu assured.

Many Demon Venerables know that the First Demon Venerable never jokes, saying that he will kill whoever he kills, but he also said that he will give benefits if he gives benefits.

Therefore, they were extremely excited at the moment, if they obtained the Gu Yuan Fruit and dedicated it to the First Demon Venerable, they would become the top ten Demon Venerables, how terrifying their strength would be!

After all, among the top ten Demon Venerables, except for the First Demon Venerable Demon Gu, there is not much difference in the strength of the other nine Demon Venerables.

In other words, they will also be promoted to this strength!

Subsequently.

The First Demon Venerable Demon Gu sent these Demon Venerables and the top Demon Lords to the Ancient Abyss Realm.

He and the First Elder both sensed the appearance of the Ancient Abyss Realm at about the same time, and then immediately gathered their subordinates, who were so far away from the Ancient Abyss Realm, and arrived at the Ancient Abyss Realm at about the same time.

Swish!

The First Demon Venerable, the Demon Gu, and these Demon Venerables all left here and headed for the Ancient Abyss Realm.

......

The years passed.

After a period of time, the First Elder and the First Demon Venerable both came to the Ancient Abyss Realm, almost at the same time.

"Get in!"

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian and the other legends to the Dao Realm and the elders fell into the Ancient Abyss Realm one after another.

On the other side, the First Demon Venerable did the same, and directly threw these Demon Venerables and Demon Lords into it.

"Yuan, did your Innate Origin Domain Alliance send them in, the number is too small, do you think you can snatch the Gu Yuan Fruit?" the First Demon Venerable sneered.

"Mogu, everything is unknown!"

The First Elder was always vigilant, although he couldn't defeat Mogu, he also had the means to hurt Mogu, and there was no problem in escaping.

If he is desperate, he also has the means to severely damage Mogu.

And the Demon Gu would never dare to be hit hard by him, after all, the top ten Demon Venerables of the Supreme Dao Void Demon were also waiting for the opportunity, and maybe they would besiege and kill the heavily injured Demon Gu.

After all, Mogu is too domineering, and there must be a lot of Demon Venerables who are unhappy with him.

It's just that the heyday of the Demon Gu was too terrifying, and the top ten Demon Venerables were not his opponents.

......

Ancient Abyss Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he felt the oppression.

His six replica bodies were scattered and could not be brought together, otherwise they would most likely all fall in case of danger.

Whew!!!

One by one, the elders scattered and left, looking for the Gu Yuanguo.

The Ancient Abyss Fruit grows on top of the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree, and the Ancient Abyss Boundary Tree is also a plant-based creature that can be moved, and no one knows where it is.

Therefore, the first patriarch only asked them to come in and look for it, and could not give the exact location.

"The First Elder said that the Ancient Abyss Realm has a lot of opportunities, supreme path rule items, innate primordial treasures, and many opportunities. I hope I can get a few more Innate Primordial Treasures and first-order Supreme Path Rule items here!"

Ye Tian secretly looked forward to it.

Soon.

He encountered a legendary creature, and it was a legendary creature of the same strength as the old dollar.

"No, this creature should be called a mythical creature!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's just that many Supreme Dao Realms don't know what the Patriarch's realm is called at all, and the fame of legendary-level creatures is even wider, so there are no Peer Dao Realms called mythical-level creatures.

In fact, legend has it that the overlord of the river abyss is also a top-notch mythical creature.

【Scaly Blood Python】

This is the name of this mythical creature, and its strength is so strong that even ordinary elders are no match for it when they meet it here.

However.

Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the Supreme Legend of the Gate was urged by Ye Tian, and the power of the second sequence to the realm of the consummation of Dao rules exploded, and it began to fight against it.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Jiao Scale Blood Python and completely suppressed the other party.

What about mythical creatures, they are still no match for him.

Soon.

Ye Tian killed this scaly blood python.

"It's a pity that it's the blood of myths, compared to the blood of legends, the energy is too majestic, and the Nine Levels to the Dao Realm can't refine it, otherwise it will explode and die, and its value is not much!" Ye Tian shook his head and said.

If it was the blood of the strongest mythology, he would be sure to refine it, but it was just ordinary mythical blood, and he couldn't look down on it.

However, if you use it as an ordinary resource to improve your cultivation, you can do it.

"Continue to search for the Gu Yuan Fruit and other treasures!"

Ye Tian continued to move forward.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian encountered a lot of trouble in the Ancient Abyss Realm, but he also found a lot of resources, and he also found a medium-quality second-order supreme rule item and two low-quality second-order supreme rule items.

It's a pity that he still hasn't found the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items and the Innate Primordial Treasure.

It's going to take luck to find this thing!

As for Gu Yuanguo, he didn't even see the slightest shadow.

However, he was not in a hurry, the Gu Yuan Realm did not disappear so quickly, and he still had enough time to find it.
